app.name: Manas
app.tagline: A safe space, just for you
app.anonymous_note: 🔒 You are completely anonymous. We never ask for your name or phone number.

age.title: How old are you?
age.subtitle: This helps us understand you better

reasons.title: What brings you here today?
reasons.subtitle: You can select more than one

mood.title: How are you feeling right now?
mood.subtitle: Tap the emoji that feels right

therapist.title: Have you ever spoken to a therapist or counsellor before?
therapist.subtitle: There's no right or wrong answer

language.title: What language do you prefer to chat in?
language.subtitle: Manas will talk with you in this language

open_text.title: Is there anything specific on your mind today?
open_text.subtitle: This is completely optional
open_text.placeholder: You can write anything, this is safe...

crisis.banner: If you are in crisis, please call iCall: 9152987821 (free, confidential)

chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.welcome: Hi, I'm Manas 🌿 I'm here to listen without judgement. You can share anything that's on your mind.
